fh.shot_strategy: On Hole 15 (White), throw a stable driver RHFH into the 1 o'clock crosswind from the left for better control and to stay out of the OB water.

bh.shot_strategy: For Hole 15 (White), your LHBH with an understable driver will naturally fade into the 1 o'clock crosswind from the left, helping you avoid the OB water.

fh.shot_strategy: On Hole 15 (White), use a stable driver for an LHFH to manage the 1 o'clock crosswind from the left and avoid the OB water.
